description: Wrong Route — Not Taken (plain header, EMCC SSM reporter)

input.mechanism: Driver queried the route and signal taken back.

expected:
⚠️ *East Midlands Route - Advice of Wrong route - Not Taken*
EMCC SSM advises wrong route offered to 1Y13 (10:09 LEEDS to NOTTINGHM) at signal DC4878 towards Derby vice Alfreton. Driver queried the route and signal taken back. Driver OK to continue. LOM aware.
